text.title: AI-Generated Test Validation Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: pricing-api test suite — 18 AI tests, 7 rejected on static rules, mutation-survival 78%, verdict=pass.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo dev let Claude Code emit tests for the new /pricing endpoint after the feature shipped. 18 tests, ~600 LOC. mutmut available in CI.

section.title: Output
